name: Ancient Love Poetry
overview: The love story between Bai Jue, one of the four true Gods, and Shang Gu. As Shang Gu grows from an inexperienced mortal to a powerful immortal, their bond faces immense challenges. Bai Jue, deeply in love with her, waits for 60,000 years, willing to sacrifice everything to be with her.

trailers.title: Ancient Love Poetry | Trailer | As the dream falls apart, memories of the past are forgotten | 千古玦尘
